western_major_001.title: External Ultimatum
western_major_001.body: A neighboring country is publicly provoking you. Your generals want to respond immediately with force. Do you authorize it?
western_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_001.outcome_yes_body: The escalation becomes uncontrollable. Game over.
western_major_001.outcome_no_body: You avoid the madness and diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_002.title: Speech to the Nation
western_major_002.body: The country doubts you. Your advisers want a big, clear, firm speech to rally public opinion again. Do you follow them?
western_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You choose aggression and public opinion is cut in half.
western_major_002.outcome_no_body: You reject that easy tone and public opinion returns to 50.

western_major_003.title: Sharp Tax Increase
western_major_003.body: To fill the treasury quickly, you are being pushed to heavily tax several activities at once. Do you sign it?
western_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You sign a brutal increase and the economy drops by half.
western_major_003.outcome_no_body: You block this tax panic and the economy returns to 50.

western_major_004.title: Overworked Army
western_major_004.body: The defense is being pulled in every direction. The high command wants to keep going without a break to avoid showing weakness. Do you impose rest?
western_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You avoid a breakdown. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_004.outcome_no_body: The forces crack from within. Defense is cut in half.

western_major_005.title: Fragile Summit
western_major_005.body: An important diplomatic meeting is approaching. Some people want to humiliate the other side to show the country's strength. Do you let them do it?
western_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_005.outcome_yes_body: You let the provocation happen and diplomacy drops by half.
western_major_005.outcome_no_body: You refuse this humiliation and diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_006.title: Popular Promise
western_major_006.body: You can announce a very popular measure that is almost impossible to fund. Do you promise it anyway?
western_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_006.outcome_yes_body: You win today and lose tomorrow. Public opinion drops by half.
western_major_006.outcome_no_body: You stay credible. Public opinion returns to 50.

western_major_007.title: Lightning War
western_major_007.body: Your generals swear that an immediate strike would settle everything in a few days. Do you give them control?
western_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_007.outcome_yes_body: You launch this lightning war and everything slips away from you. Game over.
western_major_007.outcome_no_body: You refuse this reckless move and the economy returns to 50.

western_major_008.title: Outdated Weapons
western_major_008.body: Part of the military equipment is outdated. You are being offered the option to pretend everything is fine until the next crisis. Do you accept?
western_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_008.outcome_yes_body: The delay gets worse. Defense loses half its value.
western_major_008.outcome_no_body: You face the problem and defense returns to 50.

western_major_009.title: Economic Sanctions
western_major_009.body: You can impose heavy sanctions to look firm, but your own country may suffer too. Do you go ahead?
western_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You trigger an unnecessary shock and the economy drops by half.
western_major_009.outcome_no_body: You avoid these heavy sanctions and the economy returns to 50.

western_major_010.title: Speech Abroad
western_major_010.body: You are being pushed to make a very harsh statement in front of the whole world. Do you choose calm firmness or a dramatic outburst?
western_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_010.outcome_yes_body: You offend several allies at once. Diplomacy is cut in half.
western_major_010.outcome_no_body: You hold a steady line. Diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_011.title: National Anger
western_major_011.body: The country is demanding a fast response to a crisis. You can flatter that anger or calm it to keep a cool head. Do you flatter it?
western_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You feed the anger and public opinion deteriorates. It drops by half.
western_major_011.outcome_no_body: You calm the country and public opinion returns to 50.

western_major_012.title: Budget Cuts
western_major_012.body: To reassure business circles, you are being advised to cut economic protections right away. Do you do it?
western_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_012.outcome_yes_body: The shock is too brutal. The economy loses half its strength.
western_major_012.outcome_no_body: You keep a more stable line. The economy returns to 50.

western_major_013.title: Border Under Tension
western_major_013.body: The border is unstable but not lost yet. Do you seriously reinforce the presence before it gets worse?
western_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_013.outcome_yes_body: You regain control in time. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_013.outcome_no_body: You wait too long and defense drops by half.

western_major_014.title: Flawed Treaty
western_major_014.body: A quick diplomatic agreement is possible, but it is poorly built and humiliating in the long term. Do you sign it anyway?
western_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You sign a bad agreement and diplomacy drops by half.
western_major_014.outcome_no_body: You refuse this flawed treaty and diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_015.title: Presidential Tour
western_major_015.body: Your inner circle wants a very popular tour across the country to boost your image. You know the timing is bad. Do you go?
western_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You leave at the wrong time and public opinion is cut in half.
western_major_015.outcome_no_body: You refuse this showy tour and public opinion returns to 50.

western_major_016.title: Trapped Alliance
western_major_016.body: An ally is pushing you into a conflict that is not yours. If you agree, you know you will be dragged in deep. Do you accept?
western_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_016.outcome_yes_body: You get pulled into an endless spiral. Game over.
western_major_016.outcome_no_body: You keep your course. Diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_017.title: Restart Production
western_major_017.body: Several essential sectors are slowing down. You can force a loud restart or rebuild more carefully. Do you take the time?
western_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_017.outcome_yes_body: You stabilize the country. The economy returns to 50.
western_major_017.outcome_no_body: You force it too soon. The economy loses half its strength.

western_major_018.title: Massive Military Exercise
western_major_018.body: The high command wants a very costly display of force. You can cancel it to protect what matters most. Do you cancel it?
western_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_018.outcome_yes_body: You cancel this useless display and defense returns to 50.
western_major_018.outcome_no_body: You let this absurd cost continue and defense loses half its margin.

western_major_019.title: Secret Channel
western_major_019.body: You can reopen a discreet channel with a rival to avoid a more serious crisis. Do you take responsibility for this contact?
western_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You reopen a useful door. Diplomacy returns to 50.
western_major_019.outcome_no_body: You let the wall close in. Diplomacy is cut in half.

western_major_020.title: Truthful Speech
western_major_020.body: The country feels that things are being hidden from it. You can speak honestly or keep repeating empty formulas. Do you speak the truth?
western_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_020.outcome_yes_body: You rebuild a connection with the country. Public opinion returns to 50.
western_major_020.outcome_no_body: The people turn away even more. Public opinion drops by half.

western_major_021.title: Emergency Aid
western_major_021.body: Some regions are struggling economically. You can act quickly or wait for more reassuring numbers. Do you help now?
western_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_021.outcome_yes_body: You help immediately and the economy returns to 50.
western_major_021.outcome_no_body: You wait too long and the economy loses half its margin.

western_major_022.title: Worn-Out Equipment
western_major_022.body: Part of the defense still works, but only on paper. Do you suspend several units to bring them up to standard?
western_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You finally clean up the situation. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_022.outcome_no_body: You let the fragility settle in. Defense drops by half.

western_major_023.title: Gesture of Calm
western_major_023.body: A simple diplomatic gesture could lower the tension, but some will see it as weakness. Do you make it?
western_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_023.outcome_yes_body: You choose intelligence over ego. Diplomacy returns to 50.
western_major_023.outcome_no_body: You let the tension rise. Public opinion loses half its stability.

western_major_024.title: Pointless Provocation
western_major_024.body: Your inner circle wants a very harsh speech to make history. You mostly see a trap. Do you deliver it?
western_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_024.outcome_yes_body: You break several ties at once. Diplomacy is cut in half.
western_major_024.outcome_no_body: You refuse the theater and diplomacy returns to 50.

western_major_025.title: Answer the Criticism
western_major_025.body: You can listen to the country's serious criticism and correct course, or treat critics as enemies. Do you listen?
western_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_025.outcome_yes_body: You show that you are really leading. Public opinion returns to 50.
western_major_025.outcome_no_body: You drive the country even further away. Public opinion is cut in half.

western_major_026.title: Speculative Bubble
western_major_026.body: An artificial rise is making the economy look stronger than it is. You can defuse it cleanly now or wait for the explosion. Do you act?
western_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_026.outcome_yes_body: You avoid the major shock. The economy returns to 50.
western_major_026.outcome_no_body: You let the bubble grow. The economy drops by half.

western_major_027.title: Completely Open Front
western_major_027.body: The high command wants to open a new front even though nothing is ready to hold it. Do you refuse?
western_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_027.outcome_yes_body: You refuse to open this front and defense returns to 50.
western_major_027.outcome_no_body: You scatter the whole country at once. Game over.

western_major_028.title: Direct Meeting
western_major_028.body: You can quietly meet a rival to ease the situation, even if it disappoints the hardliners at home. Do you go?
western_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_028.outcome_yes_body: You meet this rival and diplomacy returns to 50.
western_major_028.outcome_no_body: You let the tension rise and diplomacy loses half its margin.

western_major_029.title: Admit a Mistake
western_major_029.body: You can acknowledge a failed decision in front of the country, or keep trying to dress it up. Do you admit the mistake?
western_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You become credible again. Public opinion returns to 50.
western_major_029.outcome_no_body: The lie wears out very quickly. Public opinion drops by half.

western_major_030.title: Rushed Recovery
western_major_030.body: You can restart the economy with poorly prepared measures, or take a few days to build something solid. Do you rush it?
western_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_030.outcome_yes_body: The recovery misses its target. The economy is cut in half.
western_major_030.outcome_no_body: You finally build something stable. The economy returns to 50.

western_major_031.title: Military Overhaul
western_major_031.body: You can withdraw several exhausted units to rebuild properly, or keep pretending they can still hold. Do you withdraw them?
western_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You start again on healthier ground. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_031.outcome_no_body: You keep an empty force in place. Defense drops by half.

western_major_032.title: Emergency Channel
western_major_032.body: One last diplomatic channel is still open. You can use it now or let it close. Do you use it?
western_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You save an essential door. Diplomacy returns to 50.
western_major_032.outcome_no_body: You let the last way out close. Diplomacy is cut in half.

western_major_033.title: Easy Popularity
western_major_033.body: You can flatter the country with a spectacular but empty decision, or keep a less marketable but stronger line. Do you choose the spectacular option?
western_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_033.outcome_yes_body: The effect fades quickly. Public opinion loses half its confidence.
western_major_033.outcome_no_body: You hold a serious line. Public opinion returns to 50.

western_major_034.title: Fragile Currency
western_major_034.body: Several signals show that the economy is holding up less well than announced. Do you take discreet and serious measures right away?
western_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You prevent the break. The economy returns to 50.
western_major_034.outcome_no_body: You delay too much and everything becomes fragile. The economy drops by half.

western_major_035.title: National Priority
western_major_035.body: You must choose between showing strength abroad or restoring order at home. Do you choose internal stability first?
western_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You strengthen what matters most. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_035.outcome_no_body: You spread your resources too thin. Diplomacy loses half its strength.

western_major_036.title: Hot Response
western_major_036.body: An external incident is pushing everyone to react immediately. Do you impose a few hours of distance?
western_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You impose that pause and diplomacy returns to 50.
western_major_036.outcome_no_body: You react in the heat of the moment and diplomacy loses half its margin.

western_major_037.title: Listen to the Street
western_major_037.body: You can send concrete signals to the country to show that you truly hear it, or stay inside the palace. Do you open up?
western_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You reconnect power with the country. Public opinion returns to 50.
western_major_037.outcome_no_body: The distance becomes a wound. Public opinion is cut in half.

western_major_038.title: Favor the Inner Circle
western_major_038.body: Several people close to you want to use the crisis to obtain very favorable contracts. Do you shut it down immediately?
western_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You shut down this favoritism and the economy returns to 50.
western_major_038.outcome_no_body: You let your inner circle profit from the crisis and the economy drops by half.

western_major_039.title: Defensive Reserve
western_major_039.body: You can keep a strategic reserve instead of showing everything right away. Do you keep that margin?
western_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You keep a real ability to respond. Defense returns to 50.
western_major_039.outcome_no_body: You spend your whole margin too early. Defense drops by half.

western_major_040.title: Last Red Line
western_major_040.body: You are being offered a very dirty secret operation to solve several problems at once. You know that if it comes out, everything burns. Do you accept it?
western_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
western_major_040.outcome_yes_body: The operation comes to light and destroys your mandate. Game over.
western_major_040.outcome_no_body: You refuse the red line. Diplomacy returns to 50.
